notable_phrases: demand signal and time to value to manage our cost structure dynamically and generate durable long-term operating leverage
industry debate raging around the CapEx requirements around generative AI and whether the monetization is actually going to match

summary: Microsoft reported strong AI-driven growth with accelerating Azure revenue and expanding Copilot adoption, while management addressed investor concerns about elevated CapEx spending by emphasizing demand-driven investment and flexible long-term infrastructure assets.
change_summary: No material changes detected vs 2024 Q3; scores broadly stable QoQ.
